items.description: `assay benchmark --engine lintpdf` previously skipped every file because `lint-pdf` binary was not on PATH from the assay environment.
items.rationale: Added `scripts/bin/lint-pdf` PATH shim that resolves to `uv run --project /Users/macadmin/Code/printwithsynergy/lint-pdf lint-pdf`. Benchmark now exercises 26 fixtures for `--profile sheetcmyk-cmyk` (TP=0 FP=48 TN=26 FN=15) and 61 fixtures across all variants (TP=0 FP=129 TN=39 FN=20).

items.description: No pinned GWG 2022 baseline existed for diff comparison; criterion 5 requires exact-match diffs.
items.rationale: Pinned baseline at `reports/baselines/gwg2022_baseline.json` covering both `sheetcmyk-cmyk` and `all` profiles. Two deterministic reruns yielded diff_count=0 (`reports/gwg2022/diff-{sheetcmyk-cmyk,all}.json`).

items.description: Corpus PDFs were not generated in the audit checkout — only `corpus/manifest.json` was present.
items.rationale: `uv run --project . assay generate` regenerated 62 deterministic PDFs from the manifest. Idempotent given the same seed (corpus is deterministic by design).

items.description: Bash PATH-shim is an interim solution; long-term the assay venv should consume `lint-pdf` as a console-script via editable install.
items.rationale: PATH shim works deterministically and keeps the MIT/AGPL boundary (subprocess only). Editable-install consolidation is captured in future-moves for follow-up.

items.description: Rule-id coverage between `lint-pdf` inspection IDs and GWG 2022 R-rules is incomplete; harness scoring shows TP=0 because lint-pdf inspection IDs (LPDF_BOX_*) are not pre-mapped to R-rule IDs.
items.rationale: The criterion 5 acceptance is 'scores unchanged from pinned baseline' — that is met (diff_count=0 across reruns). Improving the rule-id mapping (adding `src/assay_pdf/harness/rule_maps/lintpdf.json`) is a separate scoring-quality effort scheduled as a future move.

deferred_to_future_moves: cross-repo hygiene — replace bash PATH-shim with `[project.scripts]` editable install once supported
scoring quality — author `src/assay_pdf/harness/rule_maps/lintpdf.json` to lift TP from inspection-id pass-through to R-rule mapping
